title: Managerial Expertise and Capital Investment Decisions (NAAS 2026)
description: A detailed solo-narrator walkthrough of the NAAS 2026 paper on managerial learning, special items, and accounting reporting complexity.

title: CEO Pay Slice: Power, Capability, and Performance
description: A discussion of four research hypotheses on CEO Pay Slice — exploring whether pay concentration reflects CEO power, capability, or both, and under what conditions it helps or hurts firm performance.
